title: Jira Integration - updating the mapped fields?

posts.author: ClareL (Clare Lai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I currently have a board I’m looking to use as a roadmap by integrating Epics from Jira to Monday.

I’ve set this up successfully using the following:

image1203×143 11.4 KB

but now want to amend the fields on the board and add more mappings for the syncing- I cant find a way of accessing the field mapping - is this possible - or do I need to delete the integration and recreate it - in which case - presumably I lose the ability to update the already created epics?

posts.author: Reg (Reg Gray)
posts.cookedHtml: if you click on item, you can select the field mappings.

posts.author: ClareL (Clare Lai)
posts.cookedHtml: Perfect - thank you so much for the quick response!
